choice.securityNote: 🔒 For security reasons, emails and SMS may come from capitaine.firebaseapp.com. This is the official authentication service used by Prophetik.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.subtitle: Start by creating your own group or join one that already exists.

home.title: Home
home.todayChallengeInfoTitle: What is the top scores challenge?
home.todayChallengeInfoBody: Each top scores challenge asks you to pick a certain number of players based on the format (e.g., 2x2, 3x3). Your players earn real points based on their performance, and the highest total wins the challenge.
home.leaderboardLockedBody: Upgrade to Pro or Vip to see the full leaderboard for your default group.
home.upgradeToJoin: Upgrade to Pro or VIP to join this challenge.
home.selectGroupLabel: Select a group to view its challenges
home.threeWays: Three ways to play on Prophetik
home.loginToAccess: Log in to access the home screen.
home.noGroups: You don’t have any groups yet.

home.noActiveChallenges: No active challenges at the moment.
home.dailyShotAlreadyTaken: Already claimed today. Come back tomorrow.
home.dailyShotCapReached: Monthly limit reached. Come back next month.
home.dailyShotHint: Shake your phone  to earn +1 credit.

home.title: Challenges First goal
home.empty: No first-goal challenge in your groups today
home.infoBody:
• Choose the player who will score the first goal of the game.
• Watch the results in the Sports / MatchLive tab.
• One point is awarded to the participant who correctly predicts the first goal scorer.
• If no one makes the correct prediction, the point carries over and the jackpot increases.

summary.hint: Members will receive a notification and can choose one player before the game starts.

pick.editUntil: You can change your pick until

ascensions.infoBody: An Ascension is a multi-day challenge where you progress step by step. Each completed challenge advances your climb, and daily bonus points can increase the reward at the summit.

credits.editChargedToast: 1 credit was charged for the modification.

wallet.footerNote: Secure payments • Prophetik Tokens delivered instantly

You just received +{{amount}} token(s).
Your balance will update shortly.

You have already used your bonus recently.
You can request another one starting on {{date}}.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Everything you need to know to create a challenge, join it, understand formats, the prize pool, and tie-breakers.

formats.title: Formats & entry cost
formats.rule: Simple rule: cost = number of players you must pick

create.title: Create a challenge
create.deadlinePill: Sign up / edit: until 1 hour before the first game
create.deadlineNote: The “Create” button can be disabled if the deadline has passed (1 hour before the first game).

join.title: Join a challenge
join.step4: Select the number of players required by the format.
join.editPill: You can change your picks until 1 hour before the first game

pot.title: Prize pool & winnings
pot.rule1: Each entry adds points to the prize pool.
pot.rule2: The winner earns the challenge prize pool.
pot.exampleBody: 2x2 challenge with 5 players → entry cost 2 points each → prize pool = 10 points.

tiebreak.title: Tie-breaker
tiebreak.intro: If multiple players have the same score, Prophetik uses an automatic tie-breaker to determine a single winner.
tiebreak.note: You can adjust these rules depending on your backend logic.

groups.title: Groups: create & join
groups.create: Create a group: choose a name, then invite friends.
groups.join: Join a group: accept an invite or use a code/link (if available).
groups.role: The group owner can manage settings and members.

howItWorks.footer: Prophetik evolves: some options may vary depending on the group or special events.

subscriptions.title: Prophetik Subscriptions
subscriptions.subtitle: Leaderboard access is per participant (your plan). Other members can stay Free.
subscriptions.loginToManage: Log in to manage your subscription.
subscriptions.downgradeBody: You’ll lose access to premium features. You can upgrade again anytime.

pro.3: More groups and higher weekly limits

vip.2: Advanced player stats with AI insights
vip.3: Optional Nova AI participant (can be disabled)

group.noStats: No stats yet for this group.

empty.noGroups: You don’t have any groups yet.

upgradeCta.freeBody: Go Pro to see your win rate and open participant details. VIP also adds advanced stats and charts.
upgradeCta.proTitle: Go VIP for the full experience
upgradeCta.proBody: VIP adds advanced stats, real charts, and the PPG column (more participant details).

premiumOnly.title: Premium leaderboard
premiumOnly.body: Upgrade to Starter, Pro, or VIP to view leaderboards for all your groups.

legend.title: Leaderboard legend
legend.name: Name
legend.subtitleFree: Unlock detailed leaderboards with Pro or VIP.
legend.pointsTotalHelp: Total Prophetik points earned in this group (all challenges combined).
legend.ppgHelp: Real points generated by your selections ÷ matches (overall).

free.title: Unlock the detailed leaderboard
free.body: With Pro, you see win rate and can open participant details.

pro.title: Full leaderboard experience
pro.body: VIP unlocks PPG (selections) and advanced participant insights.

vipDetails.title: Participant details (VIP)
vipDetails.body: Each participant is clickable: tap a row to open detailed performance.
vipDetails.b1: Comparison: total points vs group average
vipDetails.b2: Overall win rate and win rate by challenge format
vipDetails.b3: PPG (selections) overall and by challenge format

legend.freeFootnote: 🔒 Some statistics are available to subscribers only.

points.title: Points
points.subtitle: Compared to the weighted average of other participants

winRate.title: Challenge conversion rate
winRate.subtitle: Overall win rate + by type (weighted by number of challenges).

nhl.title: Player performance
nhl.subtitle: Real points generated by your picks (PPG = points / games).

leaderboardMember.footer: Data: {{plays}} challenges, {{wins}} wins · Compared against {{others}} others.

create.title: Create an Ascension

concept.title: What is an Ascension?
concept.body1: An Ascension is a multi-day challenge. You start on a specific date, progress through stages, and compare your performance to other members in the group.

group.noneBody: Create a group to launch an Ascension.

create.startDate: Choose when to start: today or tomorrow (no later).
create.planLocked: Your plan doesn’t allow this format.

confirm.title: Confirm
confirm.note: A challenge will be created automatically after your confirmation.

cannot.title: Cannot create
cannot.body: Check the steps and try again.

common.confirm: Everything is ready. You can create it now.

step1.title: Choose a group
step1.body: Select the group where you want to create this challenge.

step2.title: Choose a format
step2.body: Each format has its own rules. Pick the one that fits you best.

step3.title: Choose a date
step3.body: Select a day with NHL games.

confirm.title: Review
confirm.body: Double-check the details before creating the challenge.

success.title: Challenge created
success.body: Great choice. The challenge is now open to participants.

intro.title: Ascension mode
intro.body: Ascension is a multi-day challenge where participants climb step by step.

step1.title: Choose a group
step1.body: Select the group that will take part in this Ascension.

step2.title: Choose Ascension type
step2.body: Ascension 4 is shorter. Ascension 7 requires more strategy.

step3.title: Start date
step3.body: Ascension always starts on a specific date. Choose carefully.

confirm.title: Ready to launch
confirm.body: Everything is set. You can now launch the Ascension.
